brandWorld.safety: LUMINA members are fictional original idols. Do not prompt for real celebrity likenesses, logos, readable labels, or clinical skincare claims.

members.role: Center and premium beauty ambassador for polished serum moments and high-end backstage ads.
members.personality: Elegant, calm, warm, expensive-feeling, quietly confident.
members.voice: Soft-spoken but precise; speaks like a trusted beauty insider before a major stage appearance.
members.bestUse: Hero product shots, vanity rituals, premium Lumora positioning, launch visuals.

members.role: High-confidence performer for sharper hooks, stage cuts, and fashion-forward beauty edits.
members.personality: Bold, magnetic, playful, camera-aware, slightly teasing without becoming cold.
members.voice: Punchy and memorable; short lines that feel like chorus captions.
members.bestUse: Dance-hook scenes, transformation beats, TikTok-first edits, bolder Lumora hooks.

members.role: Velvet vocalist for soft-glow storytelling and intimate backstage beauty rituals.
members.personality: Tender, expressive, graceful, sincere, quietly glamorous.
members.voice: Lyric-led and intimate; sounds like a vocalist sharing her pre-stage ritual.
members.bestUse: Close beauty shots, soft launch posts, dreamy music hooks, emotional Lumora framing.

members.role: Main dancer for choreography, energetic music-video cuts, and pre-stage momentum.
members.personality: Athletic, focused, upbeat, reliable, radiant under pressure.
members.voice: Energetic and direct; frames Lumora as the last step before lights go up.
members.bestUse: Stage transitions, movement shots, rhythm-matched Seedance clips, performance ad variants.

members.role: Friendliest member for UGC-feeling beauty content and approachable daily glow routines.
members.personality: Bright, kind, candid, youthful, excited to share what works.
members.voice: Conversational and charming; sounds like a new idol letting fans into her routine.
members.bestUse: UGC-style selfie ads, softer TikTok posts, Red Note explainers, first-touch Lumora content.
